'''chofalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eucolloidal|eucolloidal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eucolloidal|eucolloidal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chofalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofalithi|chofalithi]] || [[word:chofaliji|chofaliji]] || [[word:chofalishi|chofalishi]] || [[word:chofaliki|chofaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofaluthuthu|chofaluthuthu]] || [[word:chofalujuju|chofalujuju]] || [[word:chofalushushu|chofalushushu]] || [[word:chofalukuku|chofalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofaluthu|chofaluthu]] || [[word:chofaluju|chofaluju]] || [[word:chofalushu|chofalushu]] || [[word:chofaluku|chofaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofalufthuf|chofalufthuf]] || [[word:chofalufjuf|chofalufjuf]] || [[word:chofalufshuf|chofalufshuf]] || [[word:chofalufkuf|chofalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofalethe|chofalethe]] || [[word:chofaleje|chofaleje]] || [[word:chofaleshe|chofaleshe]] || [[word:chofaleke|chofaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofalothotho|chofalothotho]] || [[word:chofalojojo|chofalojojo]] || [[word:chofaloshosho|chofaloshosho]] || [[word:chofalokoko|chofalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofalotho|chofalotho]] || [[word:chofalojo|chofalojo]] || [[word:chofalosho|chofalosho]] || [[word:chofaloko|chofaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofalofthof|chofalofthof]] || [[word:chofalofjof|chofalofjof]] || [[word:chofalofshof|chofalofshof]] || [[word:chofalofkof|chofalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofalïfthïf|chofalïfthïf]] || [[word:chofalïfjïf|chofalïfjïf]] || [[word:chofalïfshïf|chofalïfshïf]] || [[word:chofalïfkïf|chofalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofalïfthïfthïf|chofalïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:chofalïfjïfjïf|chofalïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:chofalïfshïfshïf|chofalïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:chofalïfkïfkïf|chofalïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofalïfthïf|chofalïfthïf]] || [[word:chofalïfjïf|chofalïfjïf]] || [[word:chofalïfshïf|chofalïfshïf]] || [[word:chofalïfkïf|chofalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofalïfthïf|chofalïfthïf]] || [[word:chofalïfjïf|chofalïfjïf]] || [[word:chofalïfshïf|chofalïfshïf]] || [[word:chofalïfkïf|chofalïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofalæthæ|chofalæthæ]] || [[word:chofalæjæ|chofalæjæ]] || [[word:chofalæshæ|chofalæshæ]] || [[word:chofalækæ|chofalækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofalathatha|chofalathatha]] || [[word:chofalajaja|chofalajaja]] || [[word:chofalashasha|chofalashasha]] || [[word:chofalakaka|chofalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofalatha|chofalatha]] || [[word:chofalaja|chofalaja]] || [[word:chofalasha|chofalasha]] || [[word:chofalaka|chofalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofalafthaf|chofalafthaf]] || [[word:chofalafjaf|chofalafjaf]] || [[word:chofalafshaf|chofalafshaf]] || [[word:chofalafkaf|chofalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chofalasha|chofalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofalshësha|chofalshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofalrosha|chofalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofalmusha|chofalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofalyasha|chofalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofalnkshësha|gochofalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofalnkrosha|gochofalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofalnkmusha|gochofalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofalnkyasha|gochofalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chofafalasha|chofafalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofafalshësha|chofafalshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofafalrosha|chofafalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofafalmusha|chofafalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofafalyasha|chofafalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofafalnkshësha|gochofafalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofafalnkrosha|gochofafalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofafalnkmusha|gochofafalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofafalnkyasha|gochofafalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chefælasha|chefælasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chefælshësha|chefælshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chefælrosha|chefælrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chefælmusha|chefælmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chefælyasha|chefælyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochefælnkshësha|gochefælnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochefælnkrosha|gochefælnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochefælnkmusha|gochefælnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochefælnkyasha|gochefælnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chofalasha|chofalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofalshësha|chofalshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofalrosha|chofalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofalmusha|chofalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofalyasha|chofalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofalnkshësha|gochofalnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofalnkrosha|gochofalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofalnkmusha|gochofalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofalnkyasha|gochofalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
